core:
Route UnrealCortex core commands through `core_cmd(command, params)`.
Available commands:
- get_status()
- save_asset(asset_path: string, only_if_is_dirty: boolean = optional)
data:
Route UnrealCortex data commands through `data_cmd(command, params)`.
Available commands:
- query_datatable(table_path: string, row_filter: string = optional)
blueprint:
For creating or updating a full Blueprint, use blueprint_compose instead of chaining blueprint_cmd calls.
Route UnrealCortex blueprint commands through `blueprint_cmd(command, params)`.
graph: Route UnrealCortex graph commands through `graph_cmd(command, params)`.
level:
For batch actor operations, use level_compose instead of chaining level_cmd calls.
Route UnrealCortex level commands through `level_cmd(command, params)`.
material:
For creating a full material graph from scratch, use material_compose instead of chaining material_cmd calls.
Route UnrealCortex material commands through `material_cmd(command, params)`.
umg:
For creating a complete Widget Blueprint screen, use widget_compose instead of chaining umg_cmd calls.
Route UnrealCortex umg commands through `umg_cmd(command, params)`.
qa: Route UnrealCortex qa commands through `qa_cmd(command, params)`.
reflect: Route UnrealCortex reflect commands through `reflect_cmd(command, params)`.
editor: Route UnrealCortex editor commands through `editor_cmd(command, params)`.
gen:
AI asset generation. Submit with start_mesh/start_image/start_texturing, then poll with job_status until status is 'imported' or 'failed'. Generation takes 30-180 seconds. On download_failed or import_failed, call retry_import.
Route UnrealCortex gen commands through `gen_cmd(command, params)`.
